message:
feat(tui): cross-project thread board with view lenses and sort modes (br-3vwi.5.2)

Add ViewLens (Activity/Participants/Escalation) and SortMode
(LastActivity/Velocity/ParticipantCount/EscalationFirst) to thread
explorer. Enhanced SQL fetches participant names, escalation flags,
and velocity metrics. Thread rows show cross-project slug prefix,
escalation badges, and lens-specific metadata. Keys: 'v' cycles
lens, 's' cycles sort. 13 new tests (50 total thread tests passing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
